title: Disassemble and pack a bicycle for transport
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Disassemble and pack a bicycle for transport demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to pack a bicycle for transport

pcs.text: Determine job requirement from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with packing bicycle for transport1.3 Analyse and select method to pack bicycle for transit according to manufacturer instructions and workplace procedures

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to pack a bicycle for transport

elements.title: Disassemble bicycle

pcs.text: Source and interpret service information to disassemble bicycle2.2 Inspect, check and select tools, equipment and materials for serviceability 2.3 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work2.4 Disassemble bicycle according to workplace and manufacturer procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret service information to disassemble bicycle2.2 Inspect, check and select tools, equipment and materials for serviceability 2.3 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work2.4 Disassemble bicycle according to workplace and manufacturer procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Disassemble bicycle

elements.title: Pack bicycle for transport

pcs.text: Carry out packing of bicycle into determined transport container according to workplace procedures3.2 Inspect transport container and confirm bicycle is secure and seal transport container3.3 Report condition of transport container and document according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out packing of bicycle into determined transport container according to workplace procedures3.2 Inspect transport container and confirm bicycle is secure and seal transport container3.3 Report condition of transport container and document according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out packing of bicycle into determined transport container according to workplace procedures3.2 Inspect transport container and confirm bicycle is secure and seal transport container3.3 Report condition of transport container and document according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Pack bicycle for transport

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
